    Serialized Form

    • Package com.risk.controller

      • Class com.risk.controller.GamePlayController

        class GamePlayController extends Object implements Externalizable

        • Serialization Methods

          • readExternal
            public void readExternal(ObjectInput data) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
            The object implements the readExternal method to restore its contents by calling the methods of DataInput for primitive types and readObject for objects, strings and arrays. The readExternal method must read the values in the same sequence and with the same types as were written by writeExternal.
            Parameters:
            data - the stream to read data from in order to restore the object
            Throws:
            IOException - if I/O errors occur
            ClassNotFoundException - If the class for an object being restored cannot be found.
          • writeExternal
            public void writeExternal(ObjectOutput data) throws IOException
            The object implements the writeExternal method to save its contents by calling the methods of DataOutput for its primitive values or calling the writeObject method of ObjectOutput for objects, strings, and arrays.
            Serial Data:
            Overriding methods should use this tag to describe the data layout of this Externalizable object. List the sequence of element types and, if possible, relate the element to a public/protected field and/or method of this Externalizable class.
            Parameters:
            data - the stream to write the object to
            Throws:
            IOException - Includes any I/O exceptions that may occur

      • Class com.risk.services.MapValidate

        class MapValidate extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • adjacentCountries
            HashMap<Country, ArrayList<Country>> adjacentCountries
            Containing set of all the adjacent countries to a particular country
          • continentSetOfContinents
            HashMap<String, Continent> continentSetOfContinents
            Containing set of all the continents
          • continentSetOfTerritories
            HashMap<String, Continent> continentSetOfTerritories
            Continent set generated from the territories data
          • countriesInContinent
            HashMap<Continent, HashSet<Country>> countriesInContinent
            HashMap containing continent as key and countries belonging to continent as value
          • countrySet
            HashMap<String,Country> countrySet
            Containing set of all the countries
          • fileName
            String fileName
            Name of the file to be validated
          • mapTagData
            ArrayList<String> mapTagData
            List containing all the mapTag data, like name of author, scroll etc.
